headline: Dollar General Just Named a New CEO. Why Is Its Stock Falling?
summary: Dollar General unveiled a CEO succession plan Tuesday, with Jerry “JJ” Fleeman taking over from Todd Vasos at the start of 2027.

raw.headline: Dollar General Just Named a New CEO. Why Is Its Stock Falling?

headline: VINCI: Disclosure of transactions in on shares from March 16th to March 20th,2026
summary: Nanterre, March 23rd, 2026 Disclosure of transactions in on shares from March 16th to March 20th,2026 Within the framework of the authorization granted by the General Meeting of VINCI SA of April 17th, 2025, to trade in its shares and in accordance with the regulations relating to share buybacks, VINCI SA (LEI:213800WFQ334R8UXUG83) declares the purchases of treasury shares below (FR0000125486), carried out from March 16th to March 20th,2026: I - Aggregate presentation by day and by market Issuer

headline: Dollar General Hires Ahold’s Fleeman to Succeed Vasos as CEO
summary: Dollar General has tapped Ahold Delhaize veteran Jerry “JJ” Fleeman Jr. to succeed Todd Vasos as chief executive of the discount retailer, effective Jan. 1, 2027.

raw.headline: Dollar General Hires Ahold’s Fleeman to Succeed Vasos as CEO
raw.summary: Dollar General has tapped Ahold Delhaize veteran Jerry “JJ” Fleeman Jr. to succeed Todd Vasos as chief executive of the discount retailer, effective Jan. 1, 2027.

headline: Dollar General Corporation Appoints Jerry W. "JJ" Fleeman Jr., as Chief Executive Officer
summary: GOODLETTSVILLE, Tenn., March 24, 2026--Dollar General Corporation (NYSE: DG) today announced that its Board of Directors has appointed Jerry W. "JJ" Fleeman Jr., to succeed Todd Vasos as Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of Dollar General effective January 1, 2027. The Board intends to appoint Fleeman to serve as a director upon the effective date of the transition.

The Board intends to appoint Fleeman to serve as a director upon the effective date of the transition.

headline: Dollar General CEO Todd Vasos to step down, again
summary: This time, Ahold Delhaize USA executive JJ Fleeman will succeed him as CEO, with Vasos exiting the position in 2027.

headline: Ahold Delhaize USA CEO to depart
summary: JJ Fleeman, who spent more than three decades at the grocery company, is joining Dollar General as the retailer’s new CEO, effective January 2027.
